description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat, dark gray roof and clean, angular lines. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, accented by a blue section on the front facade. A rectangular pool or water feature is situated adjacent to the main entrance, which is marked by a wooden door and a large window. The house sits on a light blue-gray base, suggesting a paved or concrete foundation. Windows are minimal and asymmetrically placed, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The structure appears to be a single-story residence with a focus on simplicity and geometric form.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light gray walls, blue accents, and a front water feature. The design is boxy and minimalistic with a wooden entry door and large window.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, a wooden door, a large window, and a blue water feature to the right.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the blue accent wall, the main entryway, and the full extent of the water feature in front.
description_view_2: The rear side view reveals a smaller window and the continuation of the flat roof, with less architectural detail.
description_view_3: The back view displays a plain, unadorned wall with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wooden door, large window, and is flanked by a blue accent wall and a rectangular water feature; no porch or overhang present.
